data.title: Guitar Center extends debt maturity by agreeing to swap 70% of 8.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2026 for new notes due 2029.
data.description: Guitar Center, Inc. based in Westlake Village, California, has recently disclosed its agreement with a group of investors holding over 70% of its 8.50% Senior Secured Notes due January 2026. The deal involves exchanging these notes for new first-lien senior secured notes set to mature by January 2029. This initiative signifies a significant move for the company in terms of debt management and restructuring.

data.title: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited warns against seeking financial advice from its officials on social media or messaging apps.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited (TSX: FFH and FFH.U) issued a reminder to its shareholders and individuals interested in the company that Fairfax, Prem Watsa, and any Fairfax officers do not offer financial or investment guidance through social media, chat platforms, or messaging apps. It is important for shareholders and individuals to be aware that these channels are not used for dispensing financial advice.
The SEC is actively considering an “innovation exemption” designed to ease regulatory burdens on tokenization initiatives, according to Chairman Paul Atkins

data.title: NTT DATA awarded 2025 Asia-Pacific Competitive Strategy Leadership for GenAI solutions in APAC by Frost & Sullivan.
data.description: NTT DATA has been recognized for its comprehensive GenAI transformation expertise and commitment to customer-driven innovation in the APAC region. The prestigious award was presented by Frost & Sullivan on July 17, 2025, in Singapore. NTT DATA has been named the recipient of the 2025 Asia-Pacific Competitive Strategy Leadership award, showcasing their outstanding performance and strategic approach to business operations.

VP JD Vance slams WSJ’s Epstein report Vice President JD Vance strongly rejected the Wall Street Journal’s claim that Trump once sent a suggestive birthday letter to Jeffrey Epstein, calling it: “Complete and utter bullshit.”
WSJ: Sam Altman quietly outmaneuvered rival Elon Musk to become Trump’s top AI ally—patiently building his own relationship with the president over time.

data.title: USDY, a tokenized US Treasury Bill by Ondo Finance, enters Sei blockchain. Integrates institutional-grade assets.
data.description: Ondo Finance will introduce USDY, which is a tokenized product representing US Treasury Bills, onto the Sei blockchain platform. The move signifies a major step in incorporating institutional-grade assets into the blockchain network.
Former Delta Air Lines pilot Jeffrey Anderson is being nominated by Donald Trump to serve as U.S. Ambassador to the International Civil Aviation Organization, according to the White House.
Trump threatens to sue The Wall Street Journal over a report related to an alleged Epstein letter

data.title: Mesoblast reports US$13.2M gross revenue from Ryoncil® post-launch in Q1, with $162M cash on hand at June 30, 2025. Commercial success for first FDA-approved MSC product. Expanding coverage and setting exclusivities for future growth in the market. Contemplating pivotal trial for adults with SR-aGvHD. Full details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Mesoblast Limited announced the gross revenue of $13.2 million from sales of Ryoncil post-launch through the first quarter after receiving FDA approval for treating SR-aGvHD in children, becoming commercially available from March 28, 2025. The company also reported $1.6 million in revenue from royalties on sales of TEMCELL HS Inj. in Japan by their licensee, with $162 million (A$247 million) cash on hand as of June 30, 2025. Mesoblast onboarded over 25 transplant centers since the product launch and aims to finish onboarding all 45 centers accounting for 80% of U.S. pediatric transplants. The coverage for Ryoncil continues to expand, with over 250 million US lives insured by payers. Mesoblast has established MyMesoblast to assist patients and institutions with insurance coverage for Ryoncil. The FDA granted Ryoncil seven years of orphan-drug exclusive approval for treating SR-aGvHD in pediatric patients. Additionally, statutory exclusivities have been granted to prevent market entry by competitors until 2044. A meeting was held with the FDA for a pivotal trial in adults with SR-aGvHD to extend the product's label. Mesoblast has also made progress with Rexlemestrocel in chronic inflammatory heart failure and low back pain, with positive meetings held with the FDA.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy declares $0.2200 dividend on Common Stock, payable on Sep 11, to shareholders of record.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, CenterPoint Energy, Inc.'s (NYSE: CNP) Board of Directors announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2200 per share on Common Stock. The dividend will be payable on September 11, 2025, to shareholders of record at the close of business.
